mission: We're a church that feels like home, preaches Jesus, pursues freedom and loves all people!
story: Summit Church is a contemporary, Spirit-filled, Spirit-led Church with a focus on Father God's great love and grace for His children.

We believe there is no sin too great, no problem too big, and no sickness or disease too bad that Jesus cannot heal. We believe that Jesus died on the cross to bring complete healing: spirit, soul and body.
We also believe that Father God still speaks to His children today through His Word and His Spirit in order to bring revelational knowledge and direction to help us live a victorious, Christian life.
As believers, not only do we get to inherit the Kingdom of God as sons and daughters, but we also get to co-labor with Jesus to bring healing and restoration to the broken and hurting.

Summit Church is a presence driven church. In other words, we pursue after God's presence during our worship services. Our worship services are so meaningful and experiential that we label them as worship encounters. You can literally feel God's healing presence.
We are currently experiencing an outpouring of Father God's great love and healing in our church. Come and experience it for yourself.

members.name: Todd & Lorie Walker
members.bio: Todd and Lorie Walker are the Senior Pastors of Summit Church in Rainbow City, Alabama. Todd and Lorie have been pastoring since April 2000 when they started Daystar Christian Center in Gadsden, AL, which is now Summit Church which was founded in October 2018 in Rainbow City, AL. Their ministry mission is to build and advance God’s kingdom one family at a time. They have devoted their lives to encouraging others to live up to their God-given potential in Christ.

members.name: Joseph & Macall Hooper
members.bio: Joseph and Macall Hooper are the Worship Leaders at Summit Church. They have a passion for ushering in the presence of God and leading their team to pursue the presence of the Holy Spirit each week. Macall is the daughter of Pastors Todd and Lorie Walker. Joseph and Macall have a son, Kai.

members.name: Kyle & Valerie Roberts
members.bio: Kyle and Valerie Roberts are Associate Pastors at Summit Church. They have been committed to Summit Church (formerly Daystar) since 2006 and have served in various ministry roles throughout the years including children's ministry, youth ministry, and young adult ministry. Kyle carries a heart for worship and has faithfully served on the worship band since 2006 as the drummer. He also serves through the media needs and building facility needs. Valerie and Kyle also co-lead the Young Adult small group with other leadership couples within the church. Valerie has her MBA degree from Southeastern with a concentration in Missional Leadership. She has a heart for student ministry areas and loves to train and disciple others into leadership roles in the kingdom. Kyle and Valerie carry a heart for family and encouraging others always building relationships and serving where God leads. They have been married since 2010 and have three beautiful daughters: Melody, Summer, and Lucy.

members.name: Ruth Adcock
members.bio: Ruth has been involved in ministry since 1972. While living in Orange County, California, she was involved in various prayer teams including TBN prayer line. In 1980, she moved back home to Gadsden, AL. She met her husband, J.L. Adcock, and they were married in 1987. They were involved in local church ministry in Gadsden. In 2006 they came to Daystar Christian Center and were welcomed and received with much love from Pastors Todd and Lorie Walker. In 2009, J.L. was promoted home to Heaven. Ruth never felt led to go anywhere else, and she believes she is at home at Summit Church which formerly operated as Daystar. Ruth is retired as the Director of the Love Center Homeless Shelter after serving there for 28 years. She serves as Associate Pastor in charge of our greeters and welcome ministry. She also enjoys praying for those who come forward for prayer and is an amazing prayer warrior. She loves seeing God move in the lives of others. She loves to worship and experience His presence while worshipping.

members.name: Issac & Hannah Gunn
members.bio: Issac and Hannah Gunn are the Lead Children's Pastors at Summit Church. They also co-lead the Young Adult Small Group with other leadership couples in the church. Issac leads our media team and works in the sound booth to keep the livestream going on Sundays. He also teaches on Wednesday nights from time to time. He is committed to God's Word and loves serving at Summit Church. Hannah is a Kindergarten teacher and serves in the children's ministry at Summit Church along with wonderful volunteers to teach Summit kids God's Word and the importance of having a relationship with Jesus. Issac and Hannah have been at Summit Church since 2019. They have been married since 2012 and have two wonderful children: Aiden and Emma.

members.name: Nick & Lora Hill
members.bio: Nick and Lora Hill are the Youth Pastors at Summit Church. Nick is a fire fighter/paramedic serving diligently in our community. Lora is a school counselor in one of our county schools where she works with children and teens on a daily basis in a caring way. She is also working towards finishing her master's degree. They both work in fields related to the care of others, and they bring that spirit over into the youth ministry as well. Nick and Lora have a passion to see today's youth prepared for the future. They are proactive in building relationships, laying a kingdom foundation, and instilling hope and joy in this generation of youth. They both carry a spirit of mentorship and discipleship. They want to help youth identify their God-given identities and talents and help guide them along their path of using those gifts in the Kingdom of God. Nick and Lora have been members of Summit Church for several years. They also assist in leading the Young Adult Small Group with other members of Summit Church. They have been married since 2021 and have one beautiful daughter: Maura Kay.

members.name: Richard & Brenda Acray
members.bio: Richard & Brenda Acray serve as Elders at Summit Church.

members.name: Matt & Amber Rose
members.bio: Matt and Amber are Elders at Summit Church. They began attending Summit Church in 2022 and became elders in 2023. Matt is an ordained minister and has graduated from The Center for Biblical Leadership, Institute of Biblical Studies, and World Harvest Bible College. Matt has served in various ministry positions throughout the years and currently works full time as a hospice chaplain. His greatest desire is to see this generation experience a move of God. Amber has always loved Jesus! She is a worshiper and goes after God with all of her heart. She has also served in various ministry positions through the years and currently co-leads the "Grown Ups" small group (ages 40-60). Matt and Amber have been married since 2007. They have two children: Tyler and Shelby.

members.name: Keith & April Slick
members.bio: Keith and April are both ordained ministers that came to Summit in January of 2021. They have served in several areas of ministry for almost 30 years and are lovers of the Word of God and people.  They both teach on Wednesday nights and look for opportunities to share the goodness of God in their life to bring hope to others through encouragement and testimony.  They serve with the greeters ministry and have been married for more than 33 years.  They have three grown children, Kolby, Kaley and Karly, but the apple of their eye are their four grandchildren Baker, Berkley, Kohen and Kodah.
